case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP VS. MARIO LEPE LUCAS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUCAS, MARIO LEPE $816.43 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $886.43, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LUCAS, MARIO LEPE
